what_stands_out: The contrast between high satisfaction with technical growth opportunities and frustration among non-technical staff regarding career advancement.
The recurring mention of bureaucracy as a trade-off for the stability and benefits provided by a large organization.
The dichotomy between a generally supportive culture and specific reports of exclusionary or toxic team environments.
